prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPKO-DANCEDINO-JQ2210-GRN Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio RC Remote Control Dinosaur Toys, LED Lights Sounds, Green, Boys Ages 3+ Description: Roaring sounds, LED lights, fighting, dancing and more, this very cool Jurassic t-Rex dinosaur remote control toy will have any little dino enthusiast or budding paleontologist excited for a prehistoric jungle adventure or ready to rumble into a RC dinosaur battle.

These Kidplokio remote control t-Rex dinosaur toys have all the moves; the easy to use dinosaur footprint shaped remote control allows little ones to move their prehistoric pal forward or fast forward, enter fight mode to battle other dinosaurs or let their RC dino boogie down in dance mode. The remote control dinosaur toys are perfect for hours of Jurassic journey pretend play with family or friends or solo; the spectacular LED lights illuminate along the dinosaur's spine, eyes and mouth, accompanied by roaring dinosaur sounds that make this RC toy all the more fun, engaging and realistic during playtime.
And, not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with this remote control dinosaur toy from Kidplokio, he or she will be developing and improving their hand eye coordination, dexterity and fine motor skills, while engaging in creative, fun and imaginative cosplay scenarios.

The Kidplokio RC Remote Control T Rex Dinosaur Toys with LED Lights is suitable for both indoor and outdoor play; the dinosaur toys are made of high-quality, durable and non-toxic plastic so parents need not worry.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts

Note: Batteries NOT included with purchase Search Terms: radio control dino toys learning and education toys prehistoric animals toys fine motor skills stocking stuffer interactive toys Tyrannosaurus Rex toys for boys hand eye coordination training kids robot action figures Features: - REMOTE CONTROL T REX DINOSAUR TOYS: Roaring sounds, LED lights, fighting, dancing and more, this very cool Jurassic t-Rex dinosaur remote control toy will have any little dino enthusiast or budding paleontologist excited for a prehistoric jungle adventure or ready to rumble into a RC dinosaur battle! - THRILLING RC DINOSAUR FEATURES: The Kidplokio Remote Control tyrannosaurus rex dinosaur toy has all the moves; The easy to use dinosaur footprint shaped remote control allows little ones to move their prehistoric pal forward or fast forward, enter fight mode to battle other dinosaurs or let their RC dino boogie down in dance mode! - IMAGINATIVE PRETEND PLAY AWAITS: These remote control dinosaur toys are perfect for hours of Jurassic journey pretend play with family or friends or solo; the spectacular LED lights illuminate along the dinosaur's spine, eyes and mouth, accompanied by roaring dinosaur sounds that make this RC toy all the more fun, engaging and realistic during playtime! - LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS: Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with this remote control dinosaur tyrannosaurus rex toy from Kidplokio, he or she will be developing and improving their hand eye coordination, dexterity and fine motor skills, while engaging in creative, fun and imaginative cosplay scenarios - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18.5 x 5 x 11 inches; Colors: Brown or Green; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Note: Batteries not included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
